name: 4Dmedical Limited
analysis: 4DX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 37% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.7300, stop A$3.4155, target A$5.4200 (0.52:1) — then trail it.
